cards.back: A relation between a set of inputs (domain) and a set of possible outputs (range)
A function where each input has one and only one output
A function where each input has one and only one output, also known as injective
A relation between two sets where each element in one set corresponds to exactly one element in the other set
A function is injective if it is one-to-one, meaning each input has one and only one output
